commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 2 Chronicles 30:8 Now be you not stiff-necked, as your fathers were, but yield yourselves unto the LORD, and enter into his sanctuary, which he has sanctified forever: and serve the LORD your God, that the fierceness of his wrath may turn away from you. Hebrew zuae, (Haydock) is rendered vexation, Isaias xxviii. Septuagint, "ecstasy. "The Jews were frequently driven from their homes. (Menochius) There were at a loss what to do, confounded and despised.
